series_metadata.series_description: A reallocation allows the owner of an account to move all or a portion of each fund into a new fund option once per calendar year. Information includes Owners account number, name, ss#, address, DL#, mother''s maiden name, beneficiary name, ss#, address, current fund and new fund and signature of owner. Confidential - Ohio Revised Code 3334.11

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Image ; Electronic: Images are kept life of contract
